_meta.keyKnowledge: We select and apply visual conventions, processes and materials to create artworks that reflect personal expression and communicate or challenge ideas.

_source.w: We select and apply visual conventions, processes and materials to create artworks that reflect personal expression and communicate or challenge ideas.
y: At this level, our artistic choices become deliberate tools for personal expression and social commentary.
The ability to both communicate and challenge ideas through art is a powerful form of participation in society.
Selecting and applying visual language with sophistication demonstrates artistic maturity and independence.
eg: We create artworks that challenge conventional representations or audience expectations.
We select visual conventions, processes and materials that best serve our artistic intentions.
We develop a personal visual language that reflects our identity and artistic perspective.
We create work that engages with contemporary issues and debates.
We demonstrate mastery of our chosen media and processes in service of our artistic vision.
We produce artworks that function effectively on both aesthetic and conceptual levels.
